creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

(I can't really tell which version of the port you are talking about, 
but anyway.) 

The 2.1.* tree is officially dead now, so there is nothing we can 
do about if you are talking about the one on the CD.  However, if you 
have the latest bsd.port.mk (the one that comes with 2.1.7), I believe 
you should be able to use the tex port (or even teTeX) in ports-current.
